setting.label: Recording duration (seconds)
setting.help: How many seconds to listen for your voice command. Speak clearly within this window.

setting.label: Recognition language
setting.help: BCP-47 language code used for speech recognition, e.g. en-US, en-GB, fr-FR, de-DE.

setting.label: Google Cloud Speech API key (optional)
setting.help: Leave blank to use the free Google Web Speech endpoint (rate-limited). Enter a Google Cloud Speech-to-Text API key for more reliable recognition. Obtain one from console.cloud.google.com.

setting.label: Up/Down shows OSD during video playback
setting.help: When enabled, pressing Up or Down on the remote while watching a video shows the on-screen progress bar and pause controls instead of skipping forward/back 10 minutes. Takes effect immediately (no restart required).
